headline: Meta Purse: 6.9% Yielding AA3 Bonds
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. 2066 bonds yield nearly 7% despite an AA3 rating, outpacing comparable high-grade peers. Read more on META stock here.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Interactive Brokers Group, Raises Price Target to $106
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Craig Siegenthaler   maintains Interactive Brokers Group (NASDAQ:IBKR) with a Buy and raises the price target from $83 to $106.
